name: Tropical Punch Cooler
recipeIngredient: 2 (16 oz.) packages Frozen peaches, partially thawed
2 (6 oz.) cans Frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container or food processor bowl with metal blade, combine 2 tablespoons powdered sugar, 3/4 cup water, 1 package peach slices, and 1 can orange juice concentrate.
2. Blend until smooth and pour into a 4-quart non-metal container.
3. Repeat the process with remaining powdered sugar, water, peach slices, and orange juice concentrate.
4. Add pineapple juice and blend well.
5. Refrigerate until serving time.
6. Just before serving, add ginger ale and stir gently to blend.
Serves: 30 (1/2 cup)
